scope: Global Coupled 4D sampling diagnostics only; no formal training or large sampling was launched

primary_finding.name: full accumulated partial payload rewrite
primary_finding.complexity: O(N^2) cumulative serialization and fsync bytes when saving every record
source_evidence: scripts/sample_global_coupled_4d_flow.py builds a payload from the complete records list after every record
atomic_torch_save writes a complete temporary file, flushes, fsyncs, and renames it
sampling_state.json is atomically written before and after each record and contains the growing completed_ordered_sample_ids list

server_observation_provided_by_user.warning: The 0.233 records/s value is an end-of-run instantaneous rate. It must not be used as the run-wide average because O(N^2) saving makes late records slower.

local_measurement_environment.consequence: CUDA compute, SVD and end-to-end phase ratios were not fabricated; the new bounded profiler must measure them on the target server.

measured_io_benchmark.warning: Absolute numbers are specific to the local Windows filesystem. Complexity, byte amplification and within-host ratios are portable evidence.

target_server_full_run.reason: The pre-existing sampler profile stopped molecule timing before partial save and the target server artifacts are not locally accessible. Exact attribution requires the new bounded profiler.

record_expansion.formula: total rollout records = sum(generated conformer records for every selected source molecule)
record_expansion.screen10_risk: selects 10 molecules but retains every manifest record belonging to them
record_expansion.confirm30_risk: selects 30 molecules but retains every manifest record belonging to them

linear_algebra.cpu_gpu_solver_switch_status: analysis candidate only; requires measured crossover and strict numerical regression

recommended_top_three.change: append-only chunks of 25-50 records plus atomic compact index, final merge once
recommended_top_three.risk: low; tensor contents and order remain unchanged
recommended_top_three.measured_basis: chunk every 50 reduced local I/O-only time from 10.1988 s to 0.1005 s for 500 records

recommended_top_three.change: remove the full completed_ordered_sample_ids list from per-record state and write compact state once per committed chunk
recommended_top_three.measured_basis: growing atomic state writes consumed 31.46% of current-policy local I/O-only time

recommended_top_three.change: apply both independent-molecule and total-record caps to screen10/confirm30
recommended_top_three.risk: protocol choice; must freeze deterministic conformer selection in the manifest
recommended_top_three.measured_basis: rollout compute is linear in records while current save bytes are quadratic in records

formal_sampler_change_recommendation.reason: This audit intentionally leaves the default formal protocol unchanged. First run the bounded profiler on an idle server GPU, then implement chunked resume under dedicated provenance and coordinate-equivalence tests.

runtime_estimate_for_full_100_molecule_t.current_observed_run: approximately 11 hours near completion, as reported
runtime_estimate_for_full_100_molecule_t.reason: Pure compute records/s is not available on the local CPU-only audit host. An optimized estimate before server profiling would be speculation.
